items.title: prompts.chat
items.summary: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

items.comment: Meta/Llama系又放大招，社区狂欢，不过实际部署成本您考虑过吗？

items.title: LLMs-from-scratch

items.summary_cn: 在PyTorch中从头开始逐步实现类似ChatGPT的LLM

items.title: EntityBench: Towards Entity-Consistent Long-Range Multi-Shot Video Generation
items.title_cn: EntityBench ：朝向实体一致的长距离多镜头视频生成
items.summary: Multi-shot video generation extends single-shot generation to coherent visual narratives, yet maintaining consistent characters, objects, and locations across shots remains a challenge over long sequences. Existing evaluations typically use independently generated prompt sets with limited entity cov...
items.summary_cn: 多镜头视频生成将单镜头生成扩展到连贯的视觉叙事，但在镜头中保持一致的角色、对象和位置仍然是长序列的挑战。现有评估通常使用独立生成的提示集，实体覆盖范围有限...
items.comment: GitHub上的新玩具，先fork再说，说不定哪天就成神器了。

items.title: ATLAS: Agentic or Latent Visual Reasoning? One Word is Enough for Both
items.title_cn: ATLAS ：代理视觉推理还是潜在视觉推理？一个词对双方来说都足够了
items.summary: Visual reasoning, often interleaved with intermediate visual states, has emerged as a promising direction in the field. A straightforward approach is to directly generate images via unified models during reasoning, but this is computationally expensive and architecturally non-trivial. Recent alterna...
items.summary_cn: 视觉推理通常与中间视觉状态交织在一起，已成为该领域的一个有希望的方向。一个简单的方法是在推理过程中通过统一的模型直接生成图像，但这在计算上是昂贵的，在架构上也不是微不足道的。...
items.comment: AI模型迭代快得飞起，但有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: FutureSim: Replaying World Events to Evaluate Adaptive Agents
items.title_cn: FutureSim ：重播世界事件以评估自适应代理
items.summary: AI agents are being increasingly deployed in dynamic, open-ended environments that require adapting to new information as it arrives. To efficiently measure this capability for realistic use-cases, we propose building grounded simulations that replay real-world events in the order they occurred. We ...
items.summary_cn: 人工智能代理越来越多地部署在动态的开放式环境中，这些环境需要在新信息到达时对其进行调整。为了有效地衡量现实用例的这种能力，我们建议构建接地模拟，按照真实世界事件发生的顺序重放它们。我们...
items.comment: AI领域新动态，保持关注，别被营销号带节奏。

items.title: AI Regulation Updates - EU AI Act Implementation
items.title_cn: 人工智能法规更新-欧盟人工智能法案实施
items.summary: European Union implements AI Act, setting global standard for AI regulation.
items.summary_cn: 欧盟实施《人工智能法案》，为人工智能监管设定全球标准。
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，但别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。

items.title: AI Chip Market Competition Intensifies
